status_policy: File presence is evidence availability, not a passing run. Manual and external-state requirements remain incomplete until dated artifacts exist.

gates.name: End-to-end user journey
manual: Complete the ten-step PRD journey and manually compare at least five extractions with raw responses
Validate onboarding, dashboard, raw-answer viewer, competitor comparison, rate limit, and score delta
external_state: Stripe test checkout and subscription state
Live prompt generation and two paid answer-engine scans
Authenticated browser session and one-hour rate-limit interval

gates.name: Extraction accuracy
automated: Rule-level and integrated Vitest coverage for exact matches, positions, citations, recommendations, URLs, and full extraction

gates.name: Scoring math
automated: Visibility score scenarios and bonus, rounding, engine, and delta behavior

gates.name: Error resilience
automated: Backoff, runner execution, scan eligibility, and scan orchestration unit tests
manual: Confirm partial and total failure messaging against rendered UI
external_state: Invalid OpenAI and Perplexity credential scenarios

gates.name: Data integrity
automated: Selected scan orchestration and dashboard transformation unit coverage
manual: Verify two persisted scans, latest selection, historical access, timestamps, and delta
external_state: Ephemeral or human-approved shared database with two complete scans

gates.name: Performance
manual: Measure dashboard load, raw-answer drawer open time, full scan duration, and landing Lighthouse targets under documented profiles
external_state: Representative 20-prompt by two-engine scan with paid provider calls
